title: Recon & Report: The Journey to Coruscant

"'''Recon & Report: The Journey to Coruscant'''" was an article written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]] and reprinted in [[The Best of the Star Wars Adventure Journal, Issues 1-4]]. It was later reprinted on [[StarWars.com]]'s [[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]] in [[2008]], simply titled ''Recon & Report''.

The article details the status of the several parts of the galaxy (primarily the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]) six months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], as reported by a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]-allied [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] group, the [[Black Curs]], and summarized by the in-universe author, [[Dirk Harkness]].
